subcodes.first_line: O thou Fragrant and Blessed Leaf! Shouldst thou enquire about the body, it is severely afflicted, and shouldst thou ask about the physical frame
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه مبارکه اگر از جسد پرسی در کمال شدت و بلا و اگر از جسم پرسی مبتلا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat]
